name: codrag
description: Code Documentation and RAG - Multi-project semantic search for codebases. Provides semantic code search, context assembly for LLM prompts, and index management.

tools.name: codrag_status
tools.description: Get CoDRAG index status and daemon health

tools.name: codrag_search
tools.description: Search the index with semantic query

tools.name: codrag
tools.description: Get assembled context for LLM prompt injection (primary tool)

daemon.description: Optional. Required only for server mode (codrag mcp --mode server)

ollama.description: Ollama must be running for embeddings
